summary: Iteration 95: STABILIZATION PASS - All 23 backend tests passed. Dashboard changes verified: (1) compliance-en1090 returns commesse in ALL states with FT data, (2) quality-score uses adaptive categories, (3) CAM report-aziendale datetime filter works, (4) Super Fascicolo PDF generates with welder section. Frontend dashboard loads correctly showing badge '1 commessa' and dynamic quality score breakdown.
critical_code_review_comments: dashboard.py L145-161: compliance-en1090 correctly filters commesse by stato != bozza AND (has FT data OR has classe_esecuzione) - VERIFIED
dashboard.py L243-257: ft_ce_count correctly counts commesse with CE fields in fascicolo_tecnico - VERIFIED
dashboard.py L301-307: Sicurezza category only added when total_rilievi > 0 OR total_pos > 0 - VERIFIED
cam.py L443-447: report-aziendale uses $or with datetime and string for created_at filter - VERIFIED
cam.py L564-568: trend_mensile handles both datetime objects and ISO strings - VERIFIED
pdf_super_fascicolo.py L451-499: _build_cap4_welder builds welder summary table from assigned_welders - VERIFIED
pdf_super_fascicolo.py L608-667: assigned_welders populated from fascicolo_tecnico.saldature._source_welder_id - VERIFIED
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stabilization pass completed. All dashboard bugs from iterations 93-94 verified fixed. Test user user_97c773827822 has: 2 commesse (NF-2026-000001 fatturato, NF-2026-000002 chiuso with 34 FT fields), 2 lotti_cam, 5 material_batches, 3 welders, 5 instruments, 5 invoices. Session token valid until 2026-03-08.

quality_score_adaptive_categories.evidence: 5 categories shown: production, documentation, ce, quality, activity (no safety - user has 0 rilievi)

cam_datetime_filter.evidence: report-aziendale?anno=2026 returns 2 lotti, 4731.73 kg, 2 months trend data

super_fascicolo_welder_section.evidence: PDF endpoint returns 98KB+ PDF with welder section 4.4

badge_text_fix.evidence: Playwright screenshot shows badge '1 commessa' correctly formatted
